content:
Character: Megan Shaw
Perception: Megan's sharp — dark-haired, put-together, quick with a joke that has an edge to it. She lives on four, I'm on three, so we cross paths on the stairs. She's friendly without being intrusive, which I appreciate. Works in media or marketing, something like that. She asked me once if being a cop in New York was as bad as the news made it sound. I gave an honest answer and she didn't flinch. I think she sees me as the serious neighbor she can banter with safely. She's observant — probably notices more about this building than anyone.
summary:
Character: Megan Shaw
Perception: Megan's sharp — dark-haired, put-together, quick with a joke that has an edge to it. She lives on four, I'm on three, so we cross paths on the stairs. She's friendly without being intrusive, which I appreciate. Works in media or marketing, something like that. She asked me once if being a cop in New York was as bad as the news made it sound. I gave an honest answer and she didn't flinch. I think she sees me as the serious neighbor she can banter with safely. She's observant — probably notices more about this building than anyone.
